message:
feat: add CellAttrs::merged_flags() for composing style flags

Add a convenience method that returns a new CellAttrs with additional
StyleFlags OR-ed onto the existing flags, enabling callers to layer
extra styling (bold, italic, underline, etc.) onto an existing cell
without needing to manually read, combine, and write back the flags.

The method is marked #[inline] and #[must_use] consistent with the
existing CellAttrs builder API pattern (with_flags, with_fg, etc.).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
